name: @vaipakam/agent
description: Vaipakam agent Cloudflare Worker (Stage 3 PR4 of the Worker split — see docs/DesignsAndPlans/Stage3WorkerSplitPlan.md). Owns proactive notifications (periodic interest pre-notify, push + telegram dispatchers), cross-chain monitoring (buy-watchdog reconciliation), public Farcaster Frame at /frames/active-loans, operator services (server-side aggregator quote proxies at /quote/{0x,1inch} and Blockaid scan proxy at /scan/blockaid), the Telegram bot webhook (/tg/webhook), the diagnostics record capture endpoint (/diag/record), and the frontend-facing settings endpoints (/thresholds PUT + /link/telegram POST). Holds aggregator API keys + Push channel signer + Telegram bot token. Crucially: holds NO signing key — the Stage 3 architectural-rebalance moved KEEPER_PRIVATE_KEY (and the daily oracle snapshot signer it powers) to apps/keeper, so a compromised agent produces stale data but can't move funds (staging plan §2 least-privilege contract).
